diagrams.title: Step-Counting Analysis Framework
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the six-step process for analyzing non-recursive algorithms
diagrams.purpose: Visual guide for systematic algorithm analysis - ensures no steps are missed when performing mathematical analysis on non-recursive algorithms

diagrams.title: Loop Patterns and Their Complexities
diagrams.description: Common loop structures with corresponding time complexity patterns
elements: Dependent inner loop: O(n²) - triangular pattern
i to n with j ≤ i: triangular area
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for recognizing complexity patterns in code, helping identify which analysis technique to apply

diagrams.title: Summation as Geometric Area
diagrams.description: Visual representation of arithmetic series summation as area calculation
elements: Rectangle with width n and height n showing n² area
diagrams.purpose: Intuitive understanding of why Σi yields Θ(n²) complexity - the geometric interpretation helps visualize the summation result
